news.t: NEOS Investments Announces May 2026 ETF Suite Distributions
Examine XSPI for a Higher Level of S&P 500 Income
NEOS Investments Launches Boosted High Income ETF Suite

holdings.infoBox: XSPI is an equity ETF with a total of 512 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.83%, Apple at 6.80%, Microsoft at 4.56%, Amazon.com at 3.70%, and Alphabet at 3.29%.

overview.description: The NEOS Boosted S&P 500 High Income ETF (XSPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund aims for tax-efficient and high monthly income by actively investing in stocks and options on the S&P 500 Index. The fund employs call spread and covered call strategies to enhance income. XSPI was launched on Jan 29, 2026 and is issued by Neos.
